title: unable to run podman
body:
hi,

am running podman in my virtual machine and installed using the git hub link steps. 

i am able to see podman version.
[root@localhost ]# podman version
Version:            1.4.2
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.11.10
OS/Arch:            linux/amd64
[root@localhost ]# 


[root@localhost ]# podman load -i app-ace-mq-0711.tar
Error: could not get runtime: failed to mount overlay for metacopy check: invalid argument

unable to use it.

appreciate your help on same.

comments.body: kernel bug, can you upgrade your kernel
Closing, as this is a known issue (too old kernel)
